hero.title: Sell Your Avatar Wiki
hero.description: Create outfits, display them at your booth, shop player-made looks, earn Coins from purchases, and unlock avatar items usable across Roblox.

gameFeature.title: Sell Your Avatar Gameplay
gameFeature.description: Create outfits, claim a booth, shop player-made looks, earn Coins, and unlock avatar items you can wear across Roblox in this social avatar marketplace.

sellYourAvatarCodes.title: Sell Your Avatar Codes
sellYourAvatarCodes.subtitle: Check the current Sell Your Avatar promo code status and learn how to redeem future codes for Coins and other rewards.
sellYourAvatarCodes.intro: Sell Your Avatar includes an in-game Promocodes menu, but there are currently no active or expired codes available. New codes can be entered through the shopping menu when they are released.

statusCards.title: No Active Codes
statusCards.description: There are currently no working Sell Your Avatar promo codes.

statusCards.title: No Expired Codes
statusCards.description: No previous Sell Your Avatar codes have been documented as expired.

redeemSteps.title: Open the Shopping Menu
redeemSteps.description: Join Sell Your Avatar and select the shopping cart icon on the left side of the screen.

redeemSteps.title: Select Promocodes
redeemSteps.description: Choose the Promocodes button from the shopping menu.

redeemSteps.title: Enter the Code
redeemSteps.description: Paste the code into the Enter Code Here field. Codes must be entered exactly as published.

redeemSteps.title: Claim the Reward
redeemSteps.description: Select Redeem to submit the code and receive its reward.

sellYourAvatarBeginnerGuide.title: How to Play Sell Your Avatar
sellYourAvatarBeginnerGuide.subtitle: Create an outfit, display it at a booth, shop from other players and earn Coins through avatar item purchases.
sellYourAvatarBeginnerGuide.intro: Sell Your Avatar is a social shopping game built around player-created outfits. You earn Coins by purchasing avatar items from displayed outfits and when another player purchases an item shown at your booth.

steps.title: Join the Experience
steps.description: Open Sell Your Avatar through its official Roblox page and enter a public server or a free VIP server.
steps.tip: A free VIP server can provide a quieter place to build and manage your booth.

steps.title: Create Your Outfit
steps.description: Choose clothing, hair, faces, accessories and other avatar items to build a complete look.
steps.tip: Use matching items so shoppers can immediately understand the outfit's theme.

steps.title: Claim a Booth
steps.description: Find an available booth in the shopping area and claim or select it as your display space.
steps.tip: Choose a booth that is easy for passing players to see.

steps.title: Display the Outfit
steps.description: Place your completed outfit on the booth so other players can inspect its included avatar items.
steps.tip: Check the displayed outfit after placing it to make sure every item appears correctly.

steps.title: Browse Other Booths
steps.description: Walk through the shopping area and inspect outfits created by other players.
steps.tip: Compare complete looks instead of buying random items that may not work together.

steps.title: Buy an Avatar Item
steps.description: Purchase an item shown in another player's outfit to earn Coins. The purchased item is added to your Roblox inventory.
steps.tip: Purchased avatar items can be equipped and worn in other Roblox experiences.

steps.title: Earn Coins From Your Booth
steps.description: You receive Coins when another player buys an avatar item displayed as part of your outfit.
steps.tip: Keep a complete and attractive outfit displayed while you continue shopping.

steps.title: Spend Your Coins
steps.description: Use the Coins you earn to obtain avatar items that can be added to your Roblox inventory and worn across Roblox.
steps.tip: Prioritize items that fit several outfits instead of spending all your Coins on one narrow theme.

sellYourAvatarCoinsGuide.title: Sell Your Avatar Coins Guide
sellYourAvatarCoinsGuide.subtitle: Learn the confirmed Coin-earning methods and use your currency more effectively when shopping for avatar items.
sellYourAvatarCoinsGuide.intro: Coins are the main progression currency in Sell Your Avatar. The official gameplay loop provides two direct earning methods: buying an item from another player's displayed outfit and receiving a purchase through your own booth.

cards.title: Buy From Player Outfits
cards.description: You earn Coins when you purchase an avatar item displayed in another player's outfit.
details: Browse booths created by other players.
Select an item from a displayed outfit.
Complete the item purchase to receive Coins.
The purchased item is added to your Roblox inventory.

cards.title: Receive Booth Purchases
cards.description: You earn Coins when another player purchases an item included in the outfit displayed at your booth.
details: Create a complete avatar outfit.
Place the outfit on your booth.
Keep the booth visible to other shoppers.
Receive Coins when a displayed item is purchased.

cards.title: Get Wearable Avatar Items
cards.description: Coins can be spent on avatar items that are added to your Roblox inventory.
details: Purchased items remain connected to your Roblox account.
Items can be equipped through the Roblox Avatar Editor.
Items can be worn in other Roblox experiences that support them.

cards.title: Build a Clear Outfit Theme
cards.description: Use a recognizable theme such as casual, formal, fantasy, streetwear or monochrome so shoppers understand the look immediately.
details: Match clothing and accessories.
Avoid unrelated items that make the outfit look unfinished.
Use one strong visual idea for each displayed outfit.

cards.title: Display Complete Looks
cards.description: A coordinated full outfit gives shoppers more items to inspect and makes the booth easier to browse.
details: Include clothing, hair and accessories where appropriate.
Check that items do not overlap incorrectly.
Preview the full avatar before placing it on the booth.

cards.title: Buy Items You Will Use
cards.description: Focus on avatar items that fit your existing wardrobe and can be reused in several outfits.
details: Check the item before purchasing.
Avoid buying an item only because it appears on a popular booth.
Save Coins for pieces that improve multiple looks.

sellYourAvatarBoothOutfitGuide.title: Sell Your Avatar Booth and Outfit Guide
sellYourAvatarBoothOutfitGuide.subtitle: Build a coordinated avatar look, display it correctly and make your booth easier for other players to shop.
sellYourAvatarBoothOutfitGuide.intro: Your booth connects outfit creation with the game's Coin system. A player can inspect the outfit, purchase one of its avatar items and add that item to their Roblox inventory while you receive Coins from the purchase.

steps.title: Choose an Outfit Theme
steps.description: Start with one clear style before selecting individual items.
examples: Casual streetwear
Fantasy adventurer
Formal outfit
Cute pastel look
Dark monochrome style

steps.title: Select the Main Clothing
steps.description: Choose the central clothing pieces first so the rest of the outfit has a consistent base.
examples: Match the top and bottom.
Keep the main colors consistent.
Avoid combining pieces with conflicting visual styles.

steps.title: Add Hair, Faces and Accessories
steps.description: Complete the outfit with avatar items that support the main theme instead of overpowering it.
examples: Use hair that fits the outfit silhouette.
Choose a face that matches the intended style.
Add only accessories that improve the complete look.

steps.title: Check the Full Avatar
steps.description: Preview the outfit and remove items that clip, overlap or hide important clothing details.
examples: Inspect the avatar from multiple angles.
Check layered clothing and large accessories.
Use the Roblox redraw option if an equipped item is not displaying correctly.

steps.title: Claim an Available Booth
steps.description: Select an unused booth in the shopping area and prepare it for your outfit display.
examples: Use a visible booth when possible.
Avoid leaving the booth empty.
Roblox Plus players can access an exclusive booth.

steps.title: Place the Outfit on Your Booth
steps.description: Add the completed outfit to the booth and confirm that shoppers can see the included avatar items.
examples: Make sure the correct outfit is displayed.
Check that the avatar preview has loaded.
Confirm that the included items can be inspected.

steps.title: Make the Display Easy to Understand
steps.description: Use a complete, focused look so players can quickly decide which items they want to inspect or purchase.
examples: Keep one main theme per outfit.
Use visually compatible colors.
Avoid unnecessary accessories that hide other items.

steps.title: Update the Outfit Regularly
steps.description: Replace weak or unfinished displays with better coordinated outfits as you collect more avatar items.
examples: Test different outfit themes.
Keep successful item combinations together.
Use newly acquired items to improve future displays.

sellYourAvatarItemsRewardsGuide.title: Sell Your Avatar Items and Rewards Guide
sellYourAvatarItemsRewardsGuide.subtitle: Learn what you spend, what you earn and where every reward goes. Avatar items obtained through the experience are added to your Roblox inventory.
sellYourAvatarItemsRewardsGuide.intro: Sell Your Avatar connects its booth economy to real Roblox avatar items. Shopping from player outfits and attracting buyers to your own booth earns Coins, while Coins can be spent on avatar items that remain attached to your Roblox account.

rows.action: Buy an item from another player's outfit
rows.cost: The Roblox item price shown on the purchase screen
rows.destination: The purchased avatar item is added to your Roblox inventory
rows.details: Review the item name, type, creator, price and confirmation screen before completing the purchase.

rows.action: A player buys an item displayed in your outfit
rows.cost: No direct cost to the booth owner
rows.destination: The buyer receives the purchased avatar item in their Roblox inventory
rows.details: Create an outfit, place it on your booth and display items that other players may want to purchase.

rows.cost: Coins earned inside Sell Your Avatar
rows.destination: The item is added to the Roblox inventory connected to the account playing the experience
rows.details: Items obtained this way can be equipped on the avatar and worn in other Roblox experiences.

rows.cost: Shop from player outfits or generate purchases through your booth
rows.destination: The Coin balance remains part of the Sell Your Avatar gameplay system
rows.details: Coins are used to obtain avatar items; they are separate from Robux.

rows.cost: The amount displayed on the final confirmation screen
rows.reward: Account ownership of the selected item
rows.destination: Inventory category matching the item type, such as hair, hats, faces, animations or packages
rows.details: Use the item page's 2D or 3D preview and Try On option when available. Confirmed Roblox item purchases are generally final.

sellYourAvatarInventoryEquipGuide.title: Sell Your Avatar Inventory and Equip Guide
sellYourAvatarInventoryEquipGuide.subtitle: Items obtained through Sell Your Avatar are stored in your Roblox inventory. Equip them through the Avatar Editor on browser, phone or tablet.
sellYourAvatarInventoryEquipGuide.intro: All avatar item purchases completed inside Sell Your Avatar are added to the purchasing account's Roblox inventory. The exact inventory category depends on the item type, and equipped items can be worn throughout Roblox.

items.title: Where purchased items appear
items.summary: Sell Your Avatar avatar items appear in your main Roblox inventory rather than only inside the experience.
steps: Sign in to the same Roblox account used to make the purchase.
Open your Roblox Inventory.
Check the category matching the item type, including hats, hair, faces, animations, clothing or packages.
Open the item page to confirm that it is owned by your account.

items.title: Equip an item in a web browser
items.summary: Use the Roblox Avatar Editor to add the purchased item to your current avatar.
steps: Open Avatar from the Roblox navigation menu.
Select the category that matches the purchased item.
Scroll until you find the item.
Select the item icon so that it becomes highlighted and equipped.
Use the Redraw option if the avatar preview does not update correctly.

items.title: Equip or remove an item on a phone
items.summary: Phone users can control equipped items directly from the item's inventory page.
steps: Open your inventory in the Roblox mobile app.
Select the item you want to manage.
Set Wear This to Yes to equip the item.
Set Wear This to No to remove the item.

items.title: Equip an item on a tablet
items.summary: The tablet Avatar Editor works similarly to the browser version.
steps: Tap More at the bottom of the Roblox app.
Tap Avatar.
Open the correct item category.
Select the purchased item to equip it.

items.title: Wear the item in other Roblox experiences
items.summary: Sell Your Avatar rewards are Roblox avatar assets attached to your account.
steps: Equip the item through the Roblox Avatar Editor.
Join another Roblox experience using the same account.
The equipped item will appear with your avatar wherever the experience supports the standard Roblox avatar appearance.

items.title: Check an item that is difficult to find
items.summary: Inventory items are separated into categories, so the item may not appear in the first section you open.
steps: Confirm that you are signed in to the account that completed the purchase.
Check every likely inventory category.
Use the item's name or item type from its details page to identify the correct category.
Reopen the Avatar Editor after confirming ownership.

sellYourAvatarRobloxPlusBenefits.title: Roblox Plus Benefits in Sell Your Avatar
sellYourAvatarRobloxPlusBenefits.subtitle: Roblox Plus players receive an exclusive booth in Sell Your Avatar. The subscription also provides eligible purchase discounts and free private-server benefits across supported Roblox experiences.
sellYourAvatarRobloxPlusBenefits.intro: The exclusive booth is the confirmed game-specific Roblox Plus reward. Other benefits come from the wider Roblox Plus subscription and may reduce eligible avatar or in-experience purchase costs while providing broader private-server access.

rows.impact: Plus subscribers can use a booth design reserved for Roblox Plus players.

rows.benefit: Eligible avatar and in-experience purchase discount
rows.impact: Eligible purchases can cost less while the Roblox Plus subscription remains active.

rows.plus: 20% starting with the third consecutive month
rows.impact: Long-term Plus subscribers receive the larger discount on eligible purchases.

rows.plus: Free and unlimited private servers across supported experiences
rows.standard: Uses the price and access rules chosen by each experience creator
rows.impact: Sell Your Avatar advertises a free VIP server, which can provide a quieter alternative when public servers are lagging.

rows.plus: Plus 500, Plus 1000 and Plus 2000 bundles include the named monthly amount
rows.impact: Robux and Sell Your Avatar Coins are separate balances. Earning Coins does not add Robux to the account.

rows.benefit: Trade and resell supported avatar items
rows.plus: Available for eligible tradable or limited items
rows.standard: Not included without an eligible subscription
rows.impact: An item obtained through the experience must meet Roblox's own trading or resale requirements before it can be traded or resold.

rows.plus: No discount on items priced above 1,000,000 Robux, resold items, ad credits, UGC publishing fees or group fees
rows.impact: The final Roblox confirmation screen shows whether a discount has been applied to an eligible item.

sellYourAvatarVipServersUpdates.title: Sell Your Avatar VIP Servers and Updates
sellYourAvatarVipServersUpdates.subtitle: Use the free VIP-server option for a less crowded session and follow the official Roblox pages for availability changes, announcements and gameplay updates.
sellYourAvatarVipServersUpdates.intro: The Sell Your Avatar description recommends using a free VIP server when public servers are lagging. Server access is managed from the Roblox experience page, while wider Roblox outages should be checked through Roblox's official service channels.

cards.title: Current experience availability
cards.description: The official Roblox listing currently shows no running Sell Your Avatar experience. Return to the official game page to see when joining becomes available again.
cards.action: Check the About and Servers tabs on the official Roblox experience page.

cards.title: Create a Sell Your Avatar VIP server
cards.description: The game's official description directs players experiencing lag to use a free VIP server.
cards.action: Open the experience page, select Servers, find Private Servers, choose Create Private Server, enter a server name and complete the setup.

cards.title: Join an existing private server
cards.status: Available when the server is active
cards.description: The Private Servers section displays servers you created and servers that you are permitted to join.
cards.action: Open the Servers tab and select an active private server from your list.

cards.title: Configure server access
cards.description: Private-server owners can rename a server, allow their friends list, add up to 50 individual users and generate a shareable server link.
cards.action: Open the three-dot menu beside the private server and select Configure.

cards.title: Private-server account restrictions
cards.description: Users under 13 can normally join private servers owned by their friends, and their own servers are normally limited to friends. Older users can also restrict who may add them to private servers.
cards.action: Review Roblox privacy settings when a permitted player cannot join.

cards.title: Public-server lag
cards.description: A private session can reduce crowding and avoids relying on a busy public instance. It will not fix a platform-wide Roblox outage.
cards.action: Switch to a private server, rejoin the experience and compare performance.

cards.title: Roblox outage or maintenance
cards.description: During a Roblox service issue, joining can fail, pages may lag and completed purchases may appear late. Roblox states that delayed products are usually applied within one hour and no later than 24 hours.
cards.action: Check Roblox's official status information before repeatedly attempting another purchase.

cards.title: Official Sell Your Avatar updates
cards.description: Game availability, description changes and major gameplay information are published through the official Sell Your Avatar experience and the SELL THE AVATAR Roblox community.
cards.action: Follow both official Roblox pages for developer announcements and reopening information.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Sell Your Avatar

questions.question: What is Sell Your Avatar on Roblox?
questions.answer: Sell Your Avatar is a social shopping game on Roblox where you create outfits, display them at a booth, and earn Coins when other players buy avatar items from your displayed looks.

questions.question: How do I earn Coins in Sell Your Avatar?
questions.answer: In Sell Your Avatar you earn Coins in two ways: by buying avatar items from other players' displayed outfits, and by receiving Coins when another player buys an item shown at your own booth.

questions.question: Are there any active Sell Your Avatar codes?
questions.answer: There are currently no working Sell Your Avatar promo codes. The Promocodes menu is built into the shopping menu, so any future codes can be redeemed there as soon as they are released.

questions.question: Do avatar items from Sell Your Avatar stay in my Roblox inventory?
questions.answer: Yes. Avatar items obtained in Sell Your Avatar are added to your Roblox inventory and can be equipped through the Avatar Editor, then worn in other Roblox experiences that support standard avatar appearance.

questions.question: Is Sell Your Avatar free to play?
questions.answer: Yes. Sell Your Avatar is free to play on Roblox, and it also offers a free VIP server option that you can create from the experience page when public servers are lagging.

questions.question: Does Sell Your Avatar have a Roblox Plus booth?
questions.answer: Yes. Roblox Plus subscribers unlock an exclusive booth in Sell Your Avatar, along with the wider Roblox Plus benefits such as eligible purchase discounts and free private servers across supported experiences.

cta.title: Ready to Sell Your Avatar?
cta.description: Jump into the Roblox social avatar marketplace, set up your booth, and start earning Coins today!
